attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY, 
WCT.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT, 
WCT.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD, 
WCT.SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD, 
WCT.BUNDLED_TYPE, 
WCT.TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT, 
WCT.CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT, 
WCT.FORWARD_REVERSE_TYPE, 
WCT.CUSTOMS_PROCESSING_END_DT, 
WCT.COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_ROLE, 
WCT.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_CREATED_DT, 
WCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT, 
WCT.BK_SS_CD, 
WCT.EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD, 
WCT.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_USD_AMT, 
WCT.IMPORT_COUNTRY_CD, 
WCT.BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD, 
WCT.FINAL_LEG_FLG, 
WCT.RU_PRINT_ON_COMERCIAL_INV_FLG, 
WCT.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_1_TXT, 
WCT.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_2_TXT, 
WCT.RU_PRORATION_METHOD_CD, 
WCT.RU_CUSTOMS_VLTN_ROLL_UP_FLG, 
WCT.RU_UNIT_UPLIFT_PCT, 
WCT.RU_DSTN_SUB_INVENTORY_CD, 
WCT.RU_BIZ_ORGANIZATION_TYPE_CD, 
WCT.RU_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WCT.RU_ACQUISITION_COUNTRY_CD, 
WCT.RU_PROVENANCE_COUNTRY_CD, 
WCT.RU_BREAKOUT_OPTION_CD, 
WCT.RU_CUSTOMS_DOC_REQUIRED_CNT, 
WCT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WCT.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_VERSION_CD, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER                  AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WCT.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
WCT.RU_EP_SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD      ,
WCT.RU_AVG_COUNTRY_DISCOUNT_PCT   ,
WCT.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_TRX_AMT     ,
WCT.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_RULE_NAME   ,
WCT.RU_CMRC_INVC_IMPRT_REC_TYPE_CD,
WCT.RU_ULTMT_SHP_TO_INV_SVC_ORG_ID,
WCT.RU_TYPE_4_ROLE                ,
WCT.RU_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
WCT.RU_CSTM_TRXTOINV_CUR_CNVRSN_RT,
WCT.RU_TYP_4_ENTY_TRX_ISO_CRNCY_CD,
WCT.LATEST_TRANSACTION_FLG,
WCT.RU_FORWARD_LOGISTICS_TYPE,
WCT.RU_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
WCT.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WCT.RU_BK_REQUEST_NUM,
WCT.RU_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
WCT.RU_SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION WCT
  WHERE DML_TYPE = 'I'
 AND NOT EXISTS
 (
   SELECT 1
    FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
	WHERE NCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY = WCT.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY
 )
